title: IIIF Presentation 3.0 Manifest (minimal)
description: A minimal, growable schema for an IIIF Presentation API 3.0 Manifest. ponytail: validates the Manifest and one level down (Canvas); does NOT descend into AnnotationPage/Annotation/body, nor check metadata/thumbnail/provider. Add those levels when a real manifest needs them.

@context.description: Must be the IIIF Presentation 3 context URI, or an array of strings containing it (the spec requires it as the last item; position is not checked here).

id.description: The URI that identifies this Manifest.

items.description: The list of Canvases that make up the Manifest; the spec requires at least one.

languageMap.description: A language map: keys are language codes (or 'none'), values are arrays of strings.

canvas.description: A Canvas: needs id and type, and either width+height (spatial) or duration (temporal). width and height must appear together.

id.description: The spec requires an HTTP(S) URI without a fragment (#...).
